description: Canva is a visual design platform with developer tooling for embedding Canva workflows, building Canva Apps, provisioning users, and exporting audit data for enterprise teams. Its developer docs on canva.dev cover Connect APIs, the Apps SDK, SCIM provisioning, audit logs setup, a CLI, and an MCP server.
summary: Canva exposes REST HTTP APIs for Connect and SCIM, plus an npm-distributed CLI and a local stdio MCP server via the Canva CLI; Connect uses developer-created integration credentials, SCIM uses a team-generated bearer token, and the MCP server is documented as locally runnable without separate Canva auth.
